description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, punctuated by large windows on the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front facade features a central door flanked by two large windows, one of which appears to be a picture window with a planter box beneath. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms including what appear to be bedrooms, a living area, and a bathroom, with some interior furnishings such as beds, a sofa, and shelving. The structure is constructed mainly from concrete or plaster, with glass for the windows and some wooden elements for interior details. There is no visible porch, and the window arrangement is asymmetrical, with larger windows concentrated on the front and side elevations.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and a minimalist rectangular design. The interior layout and furnishings are visible through the expansive windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows (one with a planter box), and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal window openings and a back door, highlighting the more private side of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side view displaying additional windows and the depth of the building, with interior rooms visible through the glass.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window and more of the interior, including a bathroom and bedroom layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
